testcase.name: test_partial_combo_is_skipped
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_chaioz_phase1_iter7.py:234: in test_partial_combo_is_skipped assert created.status_code in (200, 201), created.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"name, items, bundle_price required"} E assert 400 in (200, 201) E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
